CustomField.description: GTMS-4548 - Field used for 6sense only, flow will copy the boolean true/false from Named Account field when that value changes. This field is created because 6sense can not read a boolean field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Field used for 6sense only, flow will copy the boolean true/false from Named Account field when that value changes.
CustomField.label: Named Account (Text)
